name: Chocolate Turtle Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate chips.
2. Combine crumbs and margarine. Press onto bottom and sides of 9-inch springform pan. Bake at 350 degrees F., 10 minutes.
3. In a 1½-quart heavy saucepan, melt carmels with milk over low heat, stirring frequently until smooth. Pour over crust.
4. Top with pecans.
5. Combine cream cheese, sugar and vanilla in an electric mixer. Mix well at medium speed.
6. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
7. Blend in chocolate.
8. Pour over pecans.
9. Bake at 350 degrees F., 40 minutes.
10. Loosen cake from rim of pan; cool before removing rim of pan.
11. Chill.
12. Garnish with whipped cream, additional chopped nuts and maraschino cherries, if desired.
